case_title: CRAIG LIPTON VS. EPI CENTER MEDSPA LLC et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR DUNNING, SCOTT AS ATTORNEY FOR LIPTON, CRAIG

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-16-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-01-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR AND DISSOLVED. (610) PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (610)
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-15-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 610
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-15-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-16-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIPTON, CRAIG AS TO DEFENDANT EPI CENTER MEDSPA LLC MOSSER DR., SCOTT FICK, JENNIFER MITCHELL, MARGARET DOES 1 TO 35 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-01-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-03-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-17-2011
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
